Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course involves translating political texts ('報導文本 (政治)'), which facilitates public access to information about institutions across languages, relating to Target 16.10.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Develops skills for international communication ('國際交流基本知能'), which are essential for knowledge sharing and building global partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
